creator_branding.font_hint: Must be a Google Font name. Leave blank to use the theme default.
creator_branding.profile_url_sub: Claim a custom URL that links directly to your storefront. Once set, it becomes your permanent public identity on FOODS.
creator_branding.slug_hint: 3–50 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only
creator_branding.slug_taken: This URL is already taken. Try another.
creator_branding.set_url_first_hint: Set a custom URL first to get a cleaner shareable link.

spin.title: Explore
spin.no_dishes_hint: Check back soon — cooks are usually live from 11am onwards.

cook_health_subscribers.title: Subscribers
cook_health_subscribers.no_subscribers_hint: Customers who subscribe to your Health Kitchen and grant feeding history access will appear here.
cook_health_subscribers.share_message: Subscribe to my Health Kitchen on FOODSbyme — healthy meals by {{name}}! https://foodsbyme.com/cook/{{username}}

cook_cravings.already_notified_body: All customers for this dish have been notified

cook_cravings.customers_notified_body_other: {{count}} customers will be alerted when you cook {{dish}}
cook_cravings.notify_failed_body: Could not notify customers. Please try again.
cook_cravings.title: Craving Intelligence
cook_cravings.no_cravings_hint: When customers mark your dishes as a craving, they'll show up here. Share your profile to get started.
cook_cravings.share_message:
